root.sql:
SELECT sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no
, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( sc_lon_m_loan_request.requestment_date , 'SD' ) as requestment_tdate , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( sc_lon_m_loan_request.requestment_date , 'MONTH' ) as requestment_month , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( sc_lon_m_loan_request.requestment_date , 'YYYY' ) as requestment_year , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name( sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no ) as memname , extract ( year from ( sc_lon_m_loan_request.requestment_date ) ) - extract ( year from ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.date_of_birth ) ) as age_year , sc_mem_m_member_address.address_no , sc_mem_m_member_address.moo , sc_mem_m_member_address.road , sc_mem_m_member_address.soi , sc_mem_m_member_address.tambol , pka_com_function.fp_get_district_name( sc_mem_m_member_address.province_code , sc_mem_m_member_address.district_code ) as district_name , pka_com_function.fp_get_province_name( sc_mem_m_member_address.province_code ) as province_name , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_position_name( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) as position_name , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no
FROM sc_lon_m_loan_request , sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_mem_m_member_address , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group
WHERE 1=2
